subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Háshim, the illustrious ancestor of the Prophet, would spread forth the feast of bounty for his guests and was famed for his munificence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء حضرت هاشم جد حضرت رسول چون بجهت مهمانها خوان نعمت میگسترد و هشم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @stories; anecdotes, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
